The modern tourist resort Book now An experience you'll never forget Bar & Pool Book now FOR THE GUESTS Luxury Deluxe Rooms Book now With beautiful views

Marina

Boutique Hotel

With pool views, Marina Boutique Hotel is situated in Moraitika and has a restaurant, a 24-hour front desk, bar, garden and terrace. Both WiFi and private parking are accessible at the aparthotel free of charge.

There is a fully equipped private bathroom with bidet and free toiletries.

Marina Boutique Hotel offers a continental or à la carte breakfast.

Guests can also relax in the shared lounge area.

Moraitika Beach is 500 m from the accommodation, while Messonghi Beach is 600 m from the property. The nearest airport is Corfu International Airport, 19 km from Marina Boutique Hotel.

Couples particularly like the location — they rated it 8.4 for a two-person trip.

We speak your language!

Reviews

MORE

Hotel's Resort

Moraitika

Moraitika is located in the south of Corfu, 19 kilometers from the city, on a hill at the base of which the modern tourist resort stretching to the beach has been created.

MORE

Hotel's Resort

Moraitika

Moraitika is located in the south of Corfu, 19 kilometers from the city, on a hill at the base of which the modern tourist resort stretching to the beach has been created.

MORE

Nearby Destination

Messonghi

Messonghi is a small village on the east coast of the island 22 kilometers from Corfu town, with a long beach and a great tourist development.
